Title: User can register with valid credentials
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal details
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration screen
2. Enter valid email, password, and personal details
3. Click on the 'Register' button
Expected Result: User account is created successfully and user is redirected to the login screen

Title: User can log in with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Open the login screen
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click on the 'Login' button
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the main application screen

Title: User can update their profile
Test Steps:
1. Open the profile management screen
2. Update personal details
3. Click on the 'Save' button
Expected Result: Profile is updated successfully and user is notified of successful update

Title: App calculates CO2 emissions accurately
Preconditions: User has logged in and entered trip details
Test Steps:
1. Enter trip details including distance and vehicle type
2. Click on the 'Calculate Emissions' button
Expected Result: App displays accurate CO2 emissions for the given trip

Title: User can view emission reports
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the emission report section
2. View the generated emission report
Expected Result: User can view the emission report with accurate CO2 emissions data

Title: User Registration
Test Data: Name, Surname, Email, Password, Car Model
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Click on "Registrati" button
3. Enter name, surname, email, password, and car model
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: Account created and user redirected to the main app screen

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Click on "Login" button
3. Enter email and password
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: User redirected to the main app screen if account exists

Title: Start Trip
Test Steps:
1. Press the start trip button
2. Application calculates distance and CO2 emissions through GPS
3. Continue driving
Expected Result: Real-time calculation of distance and CO2 emissions displayed on the screen

Title: Finish Trip
Test Steps:
1. Press the finish trip button
2. Application ends the trip calculation
3. Display fuel consumption and CO2 emissions
Expected Result: Fuel consumption and CO2 emissions displayed on the screen

Title: View Emissions
Test Steps:
1. Press the finish trip button
2. Application displays the report with distance traveled and CO2 emissions
Expected Result: Report with distance and CO2 emissions displayed on the screen

Title: View Profile
Test Steps: 1. Select the profile icon from the menu
Expected Result: User's personal information displayed

Title: Edit Profile
Test Steps:
1. Press the edit profile button
2. Modify personal information
Expected Result: Personal information updated in the database

Title: Logout
Test Steps: 1. Press the logout button
Expected Result: Application returns to the login/registration screen

Title: Calculate Distance
Test Steps: 1. Press the start trip button
Expected Result: Real-time calculation of distance and CO2 emissions stored in the database

Title: View Emissions Report
Test Steps:
1. Press the finish trip button
2. Application displays the report with distance traveled and CO2 emissions
Expected Result: Report with distance and CO2 emissions displayed on the screen

Title: Ensure device has sufficient storage space
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the device has at least 1GB of free storage space.
2. Attempt to install the application on a device with less than 1GB of free storage.
3. Confirm that the installation fails due to insufficient storage.
Expected Result: The application installs successfully on devices with at least 1GB of free storage. Installation fails on devices with less than 1GB of free storage.

Title: Verify user interface simplicity and intuitiveness
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate through all screens and verify that each screen is easy to understand and navigate.
3. Check for any confusing elements or unclear instructions.
Expected Result: All screens are simple and intuitive, with no confusing elements or unclear instructions.

Title: Verify database management
Test Steps:
1. Insert sample data into the database.
2. Update the sample data.
3. Retrieve the updated data.
4. Verify that the data is stored correctly and can be retrieved without performance issues.
Expected Result: Sample data is inserted, updated, and retrieved correctly without performance degradation.

Title: Verify internet connection requirement
Preconditions: Device is connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure the device is connected to the internet.
2. Attempt to access the application's online features.
3. Confirm that the application functions correctly when connected to the internet.
Expected Result: The application functions correctly when connected to the internet. Offline features work as expected when disconnected.

Title: Verify compatibility with Android version 8.0 and above
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android 8.0 or higher.
2. Verify that the application runs without issues.
Expected Result: The application runs without issues on devices running Android 8.0 or higher.

Title: Verify adherence to delivery deadlines
Preconditions: Delivery deadlines are known and agreed upon.
Test Steps:
1. Confirm that all deliverables are submitted on time.
2. Verify that the project is completed within the agreed-upon timeline.
Expected Result: All deliverables are submitted on time, and the project is completed within the agreed-upon timeline.

Title: Verify team's knowledge of required languages
Preconditions: Team members have been briefed on the required languages.
Test Steps:
1. Verify that team members are familiar with Java, PostgreSQL, and JavaScript.
2. Conduct a quiz or review session to ensure understanding.
Expected Result: Team members demonstrate proficiency in Java, PostgreSQL, and JavaScript.

Title: Verify battery usage
Preconditions: Application is running on a device.
Test Steps:
1. Run the application on a device.
2. Monitor the battery usage over a period of time.
3. Confirm that the application does not consume excessive battery power.
Expected Result: The application consumes minimal battery power during operation.

Title: Verify traceability matrix
Test Steps:
1. Review the traceability matrix.
2. Confirm that all requirements are properly linked to their respective functional requirements.
Expected Result: The traceability matrix accurately links all non-functional requirements to their corresponding functional requirements.

Title: Verify keyword definitions
Test Steps:
1. Review the keyword definitions provided.
2. Confirm that each definition is accurate and clear.
Expected Result: Each keyword definition is accurate and clear.

Title: Verify Moodle platform usage

2. Verify that all necessary information and resources are available.
Expected Result: All necessary information and resources are available on the Moodle platform.

Title: Verify GPS functionality
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the application can access GPS data.
Expected Result: The application can access GPS data when GPS is enabled.

Title: Verify UML usage
Test Steps:

2. Confirm that they are accurate and useful for the project.
Expected Result: The UML diagrams are accurate and useful for the project.
